nasb.text: So Delilah said to Samson, “Please tell me where your great strength is and how you may be bound to afflict you.”

esv.text: So Delilah said to Samson, “Please tell me where your great strength lies, and how you might be bound, that one could subdue you.”

cnv.text: 大利拉對參孫說：“求你告訴我，你因甚麼緣故有這樣大的力氣，要用甚麼方法才能捆綁你，好把你制伏。”

ccb.text: 于是，大利拉问参孙：“求你告诉我，你为什么有这么大力气？用什么办法才能把你绑起来制服你？”
